title: aeschynomene patula
intro: Aeschynomene patula, also known as the sensitive plant, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its compound leaves that fold up when touched or disturbed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aeschynomene patula include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Aeschynomene patula include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, stems, or roots of the plant.
